cards.name: Truth From Myths
cards.text: Revelation - If there are no [[Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table]] enemies in play, Truth From Myths gains surge. Place 1 doom on the nearest [[Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table]] enemy. Then, test [willpower](X), where X is equal to the amount of doom on [[Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table]] enemies. If you fail, take 2 horror.
cards.traits: Arthurian. Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table. Omen.

cards.name: Knight Preceptor
cards.text: Spawn - Location with no investigators. Aloof. Forced - When an investigator fails a skill test on or against an [[Arthurian]] or [[Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table]] card: place one doom on Knight Preceptor.
cards.traits: Humanoid. Cultist. Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table.

cards.name: Order Knight
cards.text: Spawn - Nearest location without an Order Knight. Aloof. Hunter. Alert. Order Knight cannot hunt to a location that already has an Order Knight. Forced - When a [cultist] or [tablet] is revealed during a skill test at Order Knight's location: Place 1 doom on Order Knight. (Limit once per phase.)
cards.traits: Humanoid. Cultist. Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table.

cards.flavor: The London police are much more efficient at their job than their Arkham cousins.
cards.name: Caught at the Scene
cards.text: Revelation - Test [agility](2) or [intellect](3). If you have "caused trouble with the police" this test gets +2 difficulty. If you fail, you must either (choose one): - Remember that you have "caused trouble with the police." - Take 1 horror. Then, disengage from all enemiesengaged with you and move to a [[Police]] location.

cards.flavor: "I need to go see a man about a dog."
cards.name: Lay Low
cards.text: Surge. Revelation - Each investigator who has "caused trouble with the police" loses 1 action.

cards.flavor: "'Ello, 'ello, 'ello. What's all this then?"
cards.name: Bobby
cards.text: Spawn - Any revealed location with no [[Police]] enemies. [reaction] After you evade Bobby by 2 or more: discard it. Forced - When Bobby is defeated: Remember that you "caused trouble with the police".

cards.name: Flatfoot
cards.text: Spawn - Your location. Prey - Investigator who has "caused trouble with the police" only. Hunter. [reaction] After you evade Flatfoot by 2 or more: discard it. Forced - After you discover a clue at Flatfoot's location, if Flatfoot is ready: Remember that you "caused trouble with the police". Forced - When Flatfoot is defeated: Remember that you "caused trouble with the police".

cards.name: Inspector Harris
cards.text: Prey - Investigator who has "caused trouble with the police" Hunter. Forced - When Inspector Harris is defeated: remember that all investigators have "caused trouble with the police"

cards.flavor: The police will be keeping a closer eye on you in any future dealings.
cards.name: Person of Interest
cards.text:
Permanent.
Remember that you have "caused trouble with the police."
The first [[Ally]] asset you play each scenario costs 1 additional resource.

cards.name: Excalibur
cards.text: [action]: Fight. You get +2[combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. [action]: Fight. You get +3[combat] for this attack. If a [tablet] is revealed during this attack, this attack deals +3 damage.
cards.traits: Item. Relic. Weapon. Melee. Arthurian. Blessed.

cards.name: The Holy Grail
cards.text: [reaction] When any amount of horror is assigned to The Holy Grail: Heal 1 damage.

cards.name: The Holy Grail
cards.text: Fast.

cards.flavor: Some have said that following the fairy paths can bring luck, but most stories tell of misfortune.
cards.name: Crossing The Fairy Path
cards.text: Revelation - Place Crossing The Fairy Path in your threat area, reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag, and seal it on Crossing The Fairy Path. Forced - When you would reveal a chaos token: Resolve the token sealed here as if it were just revealed from the chaos bag instead, doubling it's modifier. Then, discard Crossing The Fairy Path.

cards.flavor: Pixie-lights draw travellers away from safe paths and into bogs with their glowing lights.
cards.name: Drawn To The Lights
cards.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 1 damage, move to a connecting location and add Drawn To The Lights to your threat area. You cannot move. Forced - At the end of your turn: Discard Drawn To The Lights.

cards.name: Eyes of the Forest
cards.text: Revelation - Test [agility](3). If you fail, add Eyes of the Forest to your threat area. Each non-[[Elite Creature]] enemy gains Prey - You. Forced - When a non-[[Elite Creature]] enemy engages you: Take 1 horror. [action][action]: Discard Eyes of the Forest.

cards.flavor: Bugbears are bear-like creatures that lurked in the woods and are often used as a story to scare young children.
cards.name: Bugbear

cards.flavor: Wolf attacks on humans are rare as they are relatively few and live far away from humans. Neither of those things help you in your current circumstances.
cards.name: Wild Wolf
cards.text: Spawn - Location with the most enemies. Hunter. Forced - After Wild Wolf moves: A non-[[Elite Creature]] enemy at Wild Wolf's previous location also moves to it's new location. That enemy cannot attack this round. (Limit once per round).

cards.name: An Honourable Duel
cards.text: Revelation - If there are no [[Knight]] enemies at your location, An Honourable Duel gains surge. Choose a [[Knight]] enemy at your location: engage that enemy. Perform an immediate basic Fight or a Fight action printed on a [[Melee]] asset against that enemy, it gains retaliate for this attack.

cards.name: Blood on Your Hands
cards.text: Revelation - Put Blood on Your Hands into play in your threat area. Forced - When an enemy is defeated: Take 1 horror. [action]: Test [willpower](3). This test gets +2 difficulty if the top card of the encounter discard pile is an enemy. If you succeed, discard Blood on Your Hands. If there is an exhausted [[Knight]] enemy at your location, this test is automatically successful.

cards.flavor: A man can die but once.
cards.name: Into the Melee
cards.text: Revelation - Test [combat](3). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each enemy at your location. If you fail, take 1 damage plus 1 additional damage for each enemy at your location.

cards.flavor: There is little difference between bravery and foolishness on the battlefield.
cards.name: Reckless Charge
cards.text: Revelation - Test [agility](3). If you fail, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[Knight]] enemy is discarded. You must either draw that enemy, or that enemy attacks you (from the discard pile). If no enemy is discarded, take 1 horror instead.

cards.flavor: Those who leave for the battlefield are never the same as those who return.
cards.name: Campaign Knights
cards.text: Massive. Forced - When a non-[[Elite Knight]] enemy enters play: Heal 1 damage from Campaign Knights.

cards.flavor: 'Tis but a flesh wound.
cards.name: Obstinate Knight
cards.text: Hunter. Forced - When Obstinate Knight would be defeated: Heal 1 damage from Obstinate Knight (limit once per round)

cards.flavor: Some knights desire nothing beyond an honourable death in battle.
cards.name: Stalwart Knight
cards.text: Hunter. Forced - When Stalwart Knight leaves play due to a player effect other than a fight action: Each investigator takes 1 direct horror.

cards.flavor: "This is a local shop, for local people. There's nothing for you here."
cards.name: Close-Knit Community
cards.text: Revelation - Attach Close-Knit Community to your location. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at attached location takes 1 horror. Forced - When the agenda advances: Discard Close-Knit Community.

cards.flavor: You may not be able to make out what he's saying, but you're confident it isn't pleasant.
cards.name: Impenetrable Accent
cards.text: Revelation - Put Impenetrable Accent into play in your threat area. You cannot play [[Ally]] assets. Treat the printed text box of each [[Ally]] asset you control as if it were blank. [action]: Test [intellect](3). If you succeed, discard Impenetrable Accent.

cards.back_flavor: <family "Teutonic">An <del>investigator</del> from <del>Arkham</del> bound by sacred duty. <del>Punish</del> those who would pervade this sacred place. Be unbound by the <del>chains</del> that have held you. Let none stand before you. <del>Those who share the name share the fate.</del>
cards.back_text: Deck Size: The same as it was before. You are still you, after all. Aren't you? Deckbuilding Options: You remember your life before. Nothing has really changed. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Even now you feel bound by the choices you made.
cards.name: The Black Knight
cards.text:
Each copy of Visions of the Black Knight gains [wild] [wild] while it is in your hand or committed to a skill test.
[reaction] When you draw Visions of the Black Knight: You may ignore the revelation effect. Then, heal 1 damage or 1 horror.
[reaction] When a copy of Visions of the Black Knight would enter your discard pile: Shuffle it into your deck.
[elder_sign] effect: Treat this token as a [tablet], with a modifier of "0".

cards.name: Dark Truths
cards.text:
Your mind is both clouded and perfectly clear. The scenes, the visions you have have seen are real. Everything you have experienced has been from behind black steel armour. It was never possible for you to defeat the Black Knight, the Black Knight was you. You are the Black Knight. The play will be performed again, and you will perform this role until the next poor soul takes it from you. But you cannot be bound any longer. Destroy all that dance for nobody's amusement. Break the cycle.
In your campaign log, record that the investigators discovered a dark truth. Replace your investigator card and mini card with the Black Knight investigator. If any investigator's deck contains Viviane, add the Viviane weakness to your hand at the start of each scenario. If other investigators have removed any copies of Visions of the Black Knight from their deck: you may add these to your deck. If the Black Knight would be defeated during a scenario, any other investigators are immediatelydefeated. During scenario setup read the story card from this encounter set with the scenario name and follow any additional instructions.

cards.name: The Ill-Made Knight
cards.text:
When instructed to finish setup, do the following: Put the set aside Arkham Asylum location into play. Shuffle each copy of A Perfect Cut and Imposing Presence from the The Black Knight encounter set into the encounter deck. This set is indicated by the following icon:
Flip The Black Knight (Disloyal Knight) to its Lancelot side and set it aside, out of play. Replace the act with Gathering Power from the Dark Truths encounter set. Remove each other card from the game. Check campaign log. If the investigators were delayed, when the game begins, the BlackKnight investigator takes an immediate additional turn. It has no need for rest.

cards.name: The Once and Future King
cards.text: After finishing setup, perform the following: Replace the set aside Morgan Le Feyenemy with the Morgan Le Fey story asset from the Dark Truths encounter set. Replace the act with The Three Knights from the Dark Truths encounter set. When a resolution is reached, read the following resolution instead. Then, if there are investigators other than the Black Knight, read the original resolution. - Resolution 1 → Resolution 6 - Resolution 2 → Resolution 7 - Resolution 3 → Resolution 8 - Resolution 4 → Resolution 6 - Resolution 5 → Resolution 9

cards.flavor: You still need time to adjust to your new form and abilities. You have already witnessed your own might, gather that power into yourself.
cards.name: Gathering Power
cards.text: [free]Spend 1 clue: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck. You may discard it. Objective - When there are 3 copies each of A Perfect Cut and Imposing Presence in play, advance.

cards.name: Familiar and Unfamiliar
cards.text:
The familiar and unfamiliar power surges through you. Finally you are ready to stand against the flow of fate. You stare at the strangely familiar building dominating the small village's horizon. You feel as though the answers you seek are there.
Remove each copy of A Perfect Cut and Imposing Presence from the game. Fully heal all damage and horror from The Black Knight. Reveal Arkham Asylum. Read Scenario Interlude: Behind the Scenes in the Campaign Guide, skipping Behind the Scenes 5. Advance to Act 2a: UnFamiliar Ground

cards.flavor: The final refuge of the insane. And yet your mind has never been clearer.
cards.name: <del>Un</del>Familiar Ground
cards.text: Objective - When The Black Knight enters Arkham Asylum, advance.

cards.name: Final Resistance
cards.text:
The clanking of your armour fills the halls of the asylum. The patients, their face simultaneously known and unknown to you, curse Morgan for their fates as she follows a short distance behind you, a wry grin on her face. You force your way into the director's office and are met by a knight in a flashy set of armour sat in an expensive looking leather chair. 'You've gone too far this time, witch.' He rises from the seat and draws his sword, pointing it at you. 'Knights, strike down this abomination!'
Spawn Sir Lancelot at Arkham Asylum. Gather each set aside [[Of the Round Table]] enemy. Shuffle each enemy not listed under 'Knights Slain' in the campaign log together to form the Knights deck. Perform the following once, then again as many times as The Black Knight player decides: - Spawn the top card of the Knights deck at any location that does not contain an [[Elite]] enemy. Advance to Act 3a: The Fall of the Round Table.

cards.flavor: Just as told in the legends the fall of King Arthur begins with the fall of Sir Lancelot. There is was metaphorical, a knight betraying his liege for love. Here it will be much more literal. The other knights will follow, any associated with the legend must eventually be purged.
cards.name: The Fall of the Round Table
cards.text: Forced - When an [[Of the Round Table]] enemy is defeated: Spawn the top card of the Knights deck at any location that does not contain an [[Elite]] enemy. Objective - When there are no [[Elite]] enemies in play, advance.

cards.name: Silent Knight
cards.text:
The knights have fallen, the cultists broken apart. You slowly begin the march toward the cave, toward the grove, toward Avalon.
6

cards.flavor: Two final figures oppose you. Perhaps once you have struck them both down you will finally be free of the farcical performance. The only choice now is who will die by your hand first, but you must act before this twisted reality resets itself once more.
cards.name: The Three Knights
cards.text: You cannot perform the free action on Mordred or Arthur. Objective - When the Black Knight enters Arthur's Encampment or Mordred's Stronghold, advance.

cards.name: Confrontation
cards.text:
You force your way through the guards and finally find yourself face to face with your first target. But he isn't alone. Standing next to him is a familiar figure, who gives you a wry grin.
Read Scenario Interlude: The Woman with the Wry Grin in the Campaign Guide.

cards.flavor: Morgan struggles to maintain the equilibrium you seek to destroy. It is time to put an end to the two kings and your short term ally, long term enemy.
cards.name: One Less Sorceress
cards.text: [action] Spend up to 2 clues: For each clue spent either deal 1 damage to or automatically evade an [[Arthurian]] enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Forced - When King Arthur or Mordred would be defeated: Move them to Morgan Le Fey's location instead. Objective - Kill Arthur. Kill Mordred. Kill Morgan. When there are no [[Arthurian]] enemies in play, advance.

cards.name: Nothingness, For Now
cards.text:
The three figures before you begin to dissipate. You can no longer see their faces but you are confident you know the expression of at least one of them.
5
If Oliver Buckley saw Avalon and the investigators disturbed the flow of the legend.
Even in this form Buckley's final words ring in your head. You have already destroyed much of the legend to get to this point why not push a little further.
You may read the Darkest Avalon story card instead of reaching the above resolution.

cards.flavor: 'I have bested you once, and I shall do so again.'
cards.name: Viviane
cards.text: This card does not count towards your maximum hand size. Forced - When another copy of Viviane enters play: Exile that copy. Then, spawn Viviane at that location. Forced - At the end of the game: Exile Viviane. This effect occurs even if Viviane is in the victory display.

cards.flavor: Morgan weaves a spell that binds reality and fantasy together.
cards.name: Morgan Le Fey
cards.text: [[Elite Arthurian]] enemies at Morgan Le Fey's location cannot be defeated. Forced - When King Arthur and Mordred are at Morgan Le Fey's location: Flip this card.

cards.name: Morgan Le Fey
cards.subname: The Woman with the Wry Grin
cards.text: Aloof. Other [[Elite Arthurian]] enemies at Morgan Le Fey's location cannot be defeated. Investigators cannot damage Morgan Le Fey. Forced - At the end of the round: Move any excess damage on King Arthur and Mordred to Morgan Le Fey.

cards.name: Darkest Avalon
cards.text:
Amidst the sudden silence a butterfly drifts over towards you. 'How astounding.' it emits in an all too familiar voice. 'You've somehow ended up in more interesting circumstances than I have. The normal world has no place for us now but with your...unique talents perhaps we can still reach the island of Avalon.' Perhaps it is from hearing the words of your old friend but your mind unfogs from the fury that had driven you thus far. The battlefield around you deconstructs and a monstrous entity roams the empty fields, screeching. 'The true form of the eternal king. Lead him to Avalon and he will lead us in return.' A few conditions must be met before King Arthur can rest. Excalibur must be returned to the lake and, of course, Arthur must be near death.
Flip this card.

cards.name: A New Avalon
cards.text:
- Remove all The Once and Future King cards other than Hidden Grove, the scenario card and any cards in the victory display from the game. Add any cleared locations to the victory display. Move each investigator to Hidden Grove. - Gather all cards from the Avalon encounter set. This set is indicated by the following icon:
- Put the Camlann Fields, The Lake and The Black Boat locations into play. - Spawn The Once and Future King enemy at Camlann Fields. If Excalibur is not part of an investigator's deck gather it from the Arthurian Relics encounter set and attach it to The Once and Future King. - Add Heavy is the Head to the encounter discard pile. - Read the Her Final Role story card. - Put Your Final Performance into play. This is both the current act and agenda.

encounter_sets.name: The Queen of Air and Darkness
Order of the Fellowship of the Knights of the Round Table
